scripts.build: pnpm validate && pnpm build:packs && pnpm export:metadata
scripts.lint: node --check tools/extract-sprite-assets.mjs && node --check tools/validate-sprite-packs.mjs && node --check tools/build-runtime-packs.mjs && node --check tools/export-mint-metadata.mjs
scripts.typecheck: echo 'Character Studio typecheck is maintained in the v8 studio bundle'
